The '''New Gimmick Economy''' is a term coined by [[Eric Weinstein]] in his 2016 Edge essay [https://www.edge.org/response-detail/26756 Anthropic Capitalism and the New Gimmick Economy] to describe the methods governments, central banks, and other institutions use to maintain the appearance of a healthy market economy in the absence of growth.

{{Stub}}

[[Category:Economics]]
[[Category:Ericisms]]
[[sn:New Gimmick Economy]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
